use_cases: Form submission and action triggers in any application interface
Navigation and routing triggers within single-page applications
Call-to-action buttons for marketing and conversion flows
Icon or text-based interactive controls for toolbars and action bars
Accessible button controls with keyboard navigation and focus management
ai_summary: A reusable Button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management, and Tailwind CSS for styling. Supports asChild pattern for polymorphism and includes proper accessibility attributes with focus-visible ring states and disabled states.
